description:
GIVEN TTS is turned on
AND the user is not logged in
AND the user has entered a valid email and password on the Create Free Account page

steps.action: WHEN the user selects the "Create Account" button
steps.result:
THEN the account created successfully page displays
AND the following statement is spoken, "Your account was successfully created. Press select to continue and return to the <home/games/settings> page."
